html:
Exclusive to:

Contents

  • 1 Brightshade Repair Kit
  • 2 Void Repair Kit
  • 3 Auto-Mat-O-Chanic
  • 4 Trivia

Brightshade Repair Kit

This content is available only after activating the Lunar Rift

The Brightshade Repair Kit is an Item in Don't Starve Together that allows players to repair many Brightshade Items. It can only be crafted while next to the Brightsmithy. Each repair kit only has one use, but up to 10 of them can be stacked in an inventory slot.

The Brightshade Repair Kit repairs the durability of these items up to 100% — if a Brightshade item is completely broken, it can be instantly repaired to its maximum with one Brightshade Repair Kit.

Items that can be repaired with the Brightshade Repair Kit:

  • Brightshade Armor
  • Brambleshade Armor
  • Brightshade Helm
  • Brightshade Staff
  • Brightshade Sword
  • Brightshade Smasher
  • Brightshade Shoevel

Void Repair Kit

This content is available only after activating the Shadow Rift

“Will restore durability of tools and weapons crafted with Void Cloth.”

-

The Void Repair Kit is an Item in Don't Starve Together that allows players to repair many Void Items. It can only be crafted while next to the Shadowcraft Plinth. Each repair kit only has one use, but up to 10 of them can be stacked in an inventory slot.

The Void Repair Kit repairs the durability of these items up to 100% — if a Void item is completely broken, it can be instantly repaired to its maximum with one Void Repair Kit.

Items that can be repaired with the Void Repair Kit:

  • Void Robe
  • Void Cowl
  • Umbralla
  • Shadow Reaper
  • Shadow Maul
  • Nightmare Saddle
  • Gloomerang

Auto-Mat-O-Chanic

The Auto-Mat-O-Chanic is an Item in Don't Starve Together that allows players to repair the W.A.R.B.I.S. Items. Before rifts, Scrappy Werepig can drop the item. Its rare Blueprint has a small chance to drop from hammering Abandoned Junk and killing Scrappy Werepig when lunar rifts are active. Each repair kit only has one use, but up to 10 of them can be stacked in an inventory slot.

The Auto-Mat-O-Chanic repairs the durability of these items up to 100% — if a W.A.R.B.I.S. item is completely broken, it can be instantly repaired to its maximum with one Auto-Mat-O-Chanic.

Items that can be repaired with Auto-Mat-O-Chanic:

  • W.A.R.B.I.S. Armor
  • W.A.R.B.I.S. Head Gear
  • W.O.B.O.T.

Trivia

  • The Brightshade Repair Kit and Void Repair Kit were introduced in the Skill Spotlight: Wormwood, Wolfgang, Woodie update.
  • The Auto-Mat-O-Chanic was introduced in the Host of Horrors update.
DSTDSRoGSWHam

"Fix up damaged equipment"

"lunarplant_kit"
This content is available only after activating the Lunar Rift
“I'm moonlighting as a tailor.”
–Wilson
“Do I look like the kind of person who fixes things? Ugh, fiiiiine...”
–Willow
“Wolfgang will fix, good as new!”
–Wolfgang
“You can't always fix what's broken. But sometimes you can.”
–Wendy
“ITEM RESTORATION HARDWARE”
–WX-78
“Now that I'm familiar with the material, it's a simple matter to repair it.”
–Wickerbottom
“That should patch things up easy enough, eh?”
–Woodie
“Some things can be repaired.”
–Maxwell
“Even the sturdiest armör will sömetimes need repairs.”
–Wigfrid
“Mum would be proud to see how good we are at this!”
–Webber
“I usually whip things up from scratch.”
–Warly
“Fixey stuff”
–Wormwood
“Never hurts to keep a repair kit handy.”
–Winona
“A stitch here and there for a quick repair.”
–Wortox
“Fix-up stuff.”
–Wurt
“I hope this goes toward my sewing badge.”
–Walter
“Fixing it is faster than making a new one.”
–Wanda

Auto-Mat-O-Chanic[edit | edit source]
Auto-Mat-O-Chanic
"Your handy-dandy W.A.R.B.I.S. repair tool!"
Object Info
10
Source
Dropped by
(Before assisting Wagstaff)
Crafting
×1 ×1
Filters
Tier
Miscellaneous
"wagpunkbits_kit"
“Machines that fix other machines! What will science think of next?”
–Wilson
“Nice doodad.”
–Willow
“Is robot armor fixer.”
–Wolfgang
“Some things are beyond repair.”
–Wendy
“YOU WERE BUILT FOR GREATNESS, BROTHER”
–WX-78
“We should consult the manual before using this.”
–Wickerbottom
“A mechanical mechanic, eh? What'll they think up next.”
–Woodie
“A machine to fix a machine? What is this world coming to?”
–Maxwell
“How may öne kill with this?”
–Wigfrid
“We want to play with the toy!”
–Webber
“Reminds me of my mixer.”
–Warly
“Robot clothes fixer”
–Wormwood
“Nifty!”
–Winona
“An automatic mechanical mechanic? Fantastic!”
–Wortox
“It good at fixing. Like Weenowna-lady!”
–Wurt
“Cool! A thingamajigy!”
–Walter
“What will they think of next?”
–Wanda
The Auto-Mat-O-Chanic is an Item in Don't Starve Together that allows players to repair the W.A.R.B.I.S. Items. Before rifts, Scrappy Werepig can drop the item. Its rare Blueprint has a small chance to drop from hammering Abandoned Junk and killing Scrappy Werepig when lunar rifts are active. Each repair kit only has one use, but up to 10 of them can be stacked in an inventory slot.
The Auto-Mat-O-Chanic repairs the durability of these items up to 100% — if a W.A.R.B.I.S. item is completely broken, it can be instantly repaired to its maximum with one Auto-Mat-O-Chanic.
Items that can be repaired with Auto-Mat-O-Chanic:
W.A.R.B.I.S. Armor
W.A.R.B.I.S. Head Gear
W.O.B.O.T.
Trivia[edit | edit source]
The Brightshade Repair Kit and Void Repair Kit were introduced in the Skill Spotlight: Wormwood, Wolfgang, Woodie update.
The Auto-Mat-O-Chanic was introduced in the Host of Horrors update.

Tóm tắt

Nội dung này chỉ khả dụng sau khi kích hoạt Lunar Rift
title: Repair Kits
wikitext:
{{Exclusivity|Don't Starve Together}}

== Brightshade Repair Kit ==

The '''Brightshade Repair Kit''' is an [[Item]] in ''[[Don't Starve Together]]'' that allows players to repair many [[Brightsmithy Filter|Brightshade Items]]. It can only be crafted while next to the [[Brightsmithy]]. Each repair kit only has one use, but up to 10 of them can be stacked in an inventory slot.

The Brightshade Repair Kit repairs the durability of these items up to 100% — if a Brightshade item is completely broken, it can be instantly repaired to its maximum with one Brightshade Repair Kit.

Items that can be repaired with the Brightshade Repair Kit:

File:Brambleshade Armor.png|[[Brambleshade Armor]]

The Void Repair Kit is an Item in ''Don't Starve Together'' that allows players to repair many [[Shadowcraft Filter|Void Items]]. It can only be crafted while next to the [[Shadowcraft Plinth]]. Each repair kit only has one use, but up to 10 of them can be stacked in an inventory slot.

The Void Repair Kit repairs the durability of these items up to 100% — if a Void item is completely broken, it can be instantly repaired to its maximum with one Void Repair Kit.

Items that can be repaired with the Void Repair Kit:
<gallery widths="64">

== Auto-Mat-O-Chanic ==
{{Object Infobox
|name = Auto-Mat-O-Chanic
|image = Auto-Mat-O-Chanic Dropped.png

{{Quotes

|willow = Nice doodad.

|wx78 = YOU WERE BUILT FOR GREATNESS, BROTHER

The '''Auto-Mat-O-Chanic''' is an Item in ''Don't Starve Together'' that allows players to repair the W.A.R.B.I.S. Items. Before [[Lunar Rift|rifts]], Scrappy Werepig can drop the item. Its rare [[Blueprint]] has a small chance to drop from hammering [[Abandoned Junk]] and killing [[Scrappy Werepig]] when lunar rifts are active. Each repair kit only has one use, but up to 10 of them can be stacked in an inventory slot.

The Auto-Mat-O-Chanic repairs the durability of these items up to 100% — if a W.A.R.B.I.S. item is completely broken, it can be instantly repaired to its maximum with one Auto-Mat-O-Chanic.

Items that can be repaired with Auto-Mat-O-Chanic:
<gallery widths="64">
W.A.R.B.I.S. Armor.png|[[W.A.R.B.I.S. Armor]]
W.A.R.B.I.S. Head Gear.png|[[W.A.R.B.I.S. Head Gear]]
W.O.B.O.T..png|[[W.O.B.O.T.]]
</gallery>

{{Clear}}

== {{Pic|32|Placeholder}} Trivia ==
* The Brightshade Repair Kit and Void Repair Kit were introduced in the ''[[Skill_Spotlight_Update#Wormwood,_Wolfgang,_Woodie|Skill Spotlight: Wormwood, Wolfgang, Woodie]]'' update.
* The Auto-Mat-O-Chanic was introduced in the ''[[From_Beyond#Host_of_Horrors|Host of Horrors]]'' update.
